description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:latest Docker image with a postgres:latest service, sets the POSTGRES_DB variable to ci and defines a DATABASE_URL variable for the test job. Cache pip files in ~/.cache/pip/. Include a before_script that runs python -V, installs pipenv, runs pipenv lock, pipenv install, and prints the virtual‑env python version with $(pipenv --venv)/bin/python -V. Define a single stage named test and a test job that runs only on branches, executes $(pipenv --venv)/bin/python manage.py test --settings organ.settings_ci, and belongs to the test stage.
